subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again — it was a pleasure meeting at the conference. I'd absolutely be open to a formal meeting to explore how we might work together.

Please send me a few time slots that work on your end and I'll get something on the calendar for next week.

On the side, I understand you're looking to set up a senior-level technical call in parallel and would like the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering. I appreciate the interest, but I'm not able to share internal contacts externally. I'm happy to act as a point of entry and help connect you with the right people as we get the conversation started.

Hope to speak soon!

Best regards
